# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building the project..."
    - mkdir -p artifacts
    - echo "binary data" > artifacts/binary
    - echo "config data" > artifacts/config
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - artifacts/*
    expire_in: 30 days

deploy_to_prod:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - cp artifacts/binary /usr/local/bin/myapp
    - cp artifacts/config /etc/myapp/config
    - /usr/local/bin/myapp --config /etc/myapp/config

deploy_to_staging:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging..."
    - cp artifacts/binary /usr/local/bin/myapp-staging
    - cp artifacts/config /etc/myapp-staging/config
    - /usr/local/bin/myapp-staging --config /etc/myapp-staging/config
